name: Start Scientific, Inc.
summary: Start Scientific, Inc. engages in the exploration, development, and production of oil and gas interests in the United States. It holds working interests in various oil and gas leases located in Yazoo County, Mississippi in the Pickens field. The company was formerly known as Secure Netwerks, Inc. and changed its name to Start Scientific, Inc. in November 2011. Start Scientific, Inc. was founded in 2004 and is based in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma.
